queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Investigating the relationship between requested credit amount and reduced likelihood of borrower default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Assessing the association between savings balances below 100 DM and decreased credit risk exposure.
